name: Miglior Canned Cat Food - Veal & Carrots, Pate 400g
shortDescription: This formula guarantees key nutrients like Omega-3, vitamins, calcium, and phosphorus supporting strong bones and teeth, healthy skin and a glossy coat. A high-quality meal your cat will love, every day.
